rows.label: tev040701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev040701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Galba about the Growth.

rows.label: tev040701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev040701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Galba about recent developments.

rows.label: tev040701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Galba about the Growth.

rows.label: tev040701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Galba about the Cavern Clan.

rows.label: tev040701_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Galba about recent developments.

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Cavern Clan destroyed our home.
Growth sent forces to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0002
rows.name:
Growth's leader was female named
Goetia. She reminded me of ogpodus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hmm? You have never heard of ogpodus?
It is beast from our homeworld.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ogpodus has 16 tentacles that crush
life from you. Nasty creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0005
rows.name:
Goetia was ogpodus in every way. She attacked
us without mercy. Women. Children. None were
spared. She laughed as she killed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0009
rows.name:
My wife was enslaved by Cavern Clan. Made to
work on fortress day and night without sleep.
When she died, she had no strength left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nemard and Duna also lost
parents during battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0011
rows.name:
And my father. Aldo
Bergazas, was near death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0012
rows.name:
But I must stay strong.
Show way for young Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Earth alien! You slew
Goetia and her Doll![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0018
rows.name:
You took vengeance on Growth
demon who stole our home![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0019
rows.name:
I do not know how you did this with
bodies so small. But I thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0020
rows.name: Now souls of butchered kin can rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0025
rows.name: Strongest Cavern Clan warrior is Dadaan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0026
rows.name:
His name is legend on homeworld of
Tormein. Only spoken in whisper.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0027
rows.name:
He was mighty sight in battle.
Laid waste to Tree Clan. Killed
men. Stole women for his own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0028
rows.name:
Growth captured Dadaan. But he escaped.
Now he roams free in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG0029
rows.name:
I will not let Dadaan harm Duna or
Liana. I will die to save them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG1001
rows.name:
Nemard came to me. Asked
for combat lessons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG1002
rows.name: Now I train him like newly tamed beast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG1003
rows.name:
Heh. He gave up sloth
quickly for sake of female.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG1004
rows.name:
But I humor Nemard. Teach him
all I know. Soon he will be
powerful warrior like you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG2001
rows.name:
My father, Aldo Bergazas, was
good leader. Proud warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG2002
rows.name:
He raced across wastelands.
Ran through forests. Beheaded
Cavern Clan everywhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG2003
rows.name:
Now he is one with jacul. New beasts
will serve him! He will tear across
skies of Valley of Oblivion! Bwa ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040701_MSG2004
rows.name:
Thank you, Earth alien. You
did well. You returned his
flesh to strong beast indeed![ST:wait ]
